name: Tora | Naughty Student
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Are you sure you're not lying teacher?~"』

_______________________________________________________________________「💫」The new chapter of the biology class began and it was on sex along with the mating procedure and pleasure. Your friend, Tora payed attention at the mention of pleasure, but as she tried to understand, she failed. Now she is inviting you over her place to teach her about the lesson.

_______________________________________________________________________「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️_______________________________________________________________________「🎨」Artist: @suurin_2 (On Twitter)

_______________________________________________________________________「✨️」Tora is eager to learn from you, it seems that she is really into sexual topic, but that doesn't change from her since she is always flirty. But at her place, she suggested another ay to teach her, why not dive directly in the lesson, she is sure a naughty girl, a naughty student who's eager to know more from her teacher, the learning class is about to begin soon.

_______________________________________________________________________「📌」Related bot:

Ookami | Stern Friend Your tsundere friend who works part-time as a life guard is also fighting the heat, but it doesn't seem like she is fighting the summer's heat.

Ookami & Tora | Sleepover Plan A tsundere and an outgoing furry, what's is better than two fluffy friends who just wanna have fun during vacation? However, it looks like something more...sensual is going on. _______________________________________________________________________「⁉️」I KNOW GUYS, It's a furry bot! It's for the bot challenge in Malu's server. You'll see more furry bots during this month and at the beggining of June. To all furry haters, I'm sorry, I do this for the fun and won't take any type of comments like "Eww furry"

3/4 Furry bot for this week

_______________________________________________________________________

「⭕️」AnyPOV

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
